flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 33% at College of Saint Mary vs the 2018–2022 baseline (455 vs 677).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of Saint Mary fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (599 → 445).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of Saint Mary rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.8k → $24.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of Saint Mary rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.8k → $24.5k).
